name: Forest Ink
description: Deep-forest-green ink on ivory cream — the green IS the ink. Source Serif body + Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC display. Reads like a vintage National Geographic issue — sustainable, grounded, considered.
descriptionZh: 深森林绿当墨（绿就是字色本身）+ 象牙暖纸。Source Serif 正文 + Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC。像旧版《国家地理》，沉稳、有呼吸感、克制。
bestFor: 自然 / 可持续 / 环保
